description: Sorry to step in, sir — Edgelord wanted a clean card-to-card edge, but twelve corpus cards all carry the Victor Adame Minguez byline and any single mirror would just point at an absent center. I hope you don't mind: I've proposed the artist node so the whole cohort attaches cleanly. He clears the load-bearing-context gate by a wide margin (twelve credits across five blocks, biggest MTG-side artist count to date, biography documented in the Bone Pit Brute trivia pass) — it really should help future Discrete Lairs, if it's not too much trouble.
citations: [cards/magic-the-gathering/core-set-2021/132-bone-pit-brute.md trivia pass: 'a Spanish artist with a large MTG portfolio spanning Battle for Zendikar through modern releases']
[Scryfall artist field on all twelve corpus cards]
card_side_wiring: none required — all twelve cards already carry the canonical `artist: Victor Adame Minguez` frontmatter string; the artist layer resolves card-to-node via artist_resolve.py against `artist:`, not via a per-card pointer field (matches sanosuke-sakuma / magali-villeneuve / clint-cearley convention).
other_candidates_considered: John Avon — 9 corpus credits, the corpus's famed land-illustrator specialist; strong second artist-node candidate. Distinct register (basic-land vistas / dual-land panoramas) would make a well-differentiated node. Staged for a future invocation.
Sam Burley — 8 corpus credits, heavily concentrated in basic lands and gain-lands; viable artist-node candidate but register-span is narrower than Avon's. Staged.

Scott Murphy (6), Donato Giancola (5), Johannes Voss / Campbell White / Greg Staples (4-5 each) — all clear or approach the soft three-credit threshold; node-worthiness depends on per-artist documented-biography context. Surface to janitor_triage as future artist-layer candidates.

The seven freshly-modified black-bolt Pokemon cards (Snivy/Servine, Dwebble/Crustle, Pawniard/Bisharp, Braviary) are already fully wired — Connections sections present, line nodes attached, four within-set adjacent-pair structures documented. No edge work needed there this wave.
next_pass_suggestions: Commission the john-avon artist node next — 9 corpus credits, distinct land-vista register, the corpus's most recognizable land-illustrator byline.
After Avon, evaluate sam-burley (8 credits) for node-worthiness pending a documented-biography check.
